libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No additional environment or system-property setup is required. When generating or repairing tests for 2.0.0-M1, avoid org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, and TypedProps coverage from the 1.1.5 tests because those classes are no longer present in the 2.0.0-M1 pekko-actor_2.13 jar. Prefer classic ActorSystem/Props/ActorRef, configuration, serialization, DynamicAccess, dispatchers, routers, DNS settings, and other APIs still present in pekko-actor itself.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Pekko documentation lists pekko-testkit_2.13 as a normal test-scoped companion for actor testing, but ActorSystem-based coverage is still reachable without it, so this is not concrete evidence for deterministic setup.
Existing 1.1.5 metadata and tests include TypedActor reachability coverage that cannot be preserved directly for 2.0.0-M1 because the classes are absent from the target artifact.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is concretely required for meaningful pekko-actor coverage; the observed failure is caused by tests using TypedActor/TypedProps APIs present in 1.1.5 but absent from the resolved 2.0.0-M1 pekko-actor artifact.
